description: Test the interoperability of OpenICE by running two separate Supervisor instances on the same machine. Launch a second instance using /home/ga/openice/launch_supervisor.sh, ensuring its output is redirected to /home/ga/Desktop/node_b.log. Create a simulated 'Capnometer' in the second instance (Node B) and a simulated 'Infusion Pump' in the primary instance (Node A). Verify bidirectional DDS discovery between the instances and use the 'Vital Signs' app in Node A to view the remote data. Write a report confirming the bidirectional discovery to /home/ga/Desktop/interop_report.txt.
